AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.title: Misfortune
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.descript:
Takes additional damage from [gold]Unfortunate[/gold] Attacks.
Halves at the end of the enemy turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.smartDes:
Takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage from [gold]Unfortunate[/gold] Attacks.
Halves at the end of the enemy turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.title: Goof
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.description: When you obtain [blue]10[/blue] or more [gold]Goof[/gold], lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}, and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.smartDescripti:
When you obtain [blue]10[/blue] or more [gold]Goof[/gold], lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
([blue]{Amount}[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue] obtained.)
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.title: Thumb War
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.descripti: Whenever you or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.remoteDes: Whenever [gold]{Applier}[/gold] or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOOM_NEXT_TURN_POWER.desc: At the start of your next turn, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOOM_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smar: At the start of your next turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE_POWER.title: Eclipse
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE_POWER.description: [gold]Haunted[/gold] cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] are also played at the end of your turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE_POWER.smartDescri: [gold]Haunted[/gold] cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] are also played at the end of your turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH_POWER.title: Bleh
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH_POWER.description: The first time each turn you draw a Status card, [gold]Bury[/gold] it and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH_POWER.smartDescripti: #The first time each turn you draw a Status card, [gold]Bury[/gold] it and draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL_POWER.title: Bone Vigil
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL_POWER.descript: Whenever a card is [gold]Buried[/gold], [gold]Osty[/gold] heals [blue]2[/blue] HP.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL_POWER.smartDes: Whenever a card is [gold]Buried[/gold], [gold]Osty[/gold] heals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
